zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen於1120年出生時，他的父親Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND46歲，母親Liukard Von Regensburg31歲。他和Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1214年3月1日之後在德國。

zh-hans.Harburg (Schwaben), Donau-Ries, Bavaria,: 德国貝也藍德可萊斯 堂瑙-利斯哈布格
zh-hans.Frontenhausen, Germany: 德国貝也藍德可萊斯 丁格爾分-藍道福洛史豪森
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen于1120年出生时，他的父亲Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND46岁，母亲Liukard Von Regensburg31岁。他和Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1214年3月1日之后在德国。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen was born in 1120, his father, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, was 46 and his mother, Liukard Von Regensburg, was 31. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. He died after 1 March 1214, in Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen est né en 1120, son père, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Liukard Von Regensburg, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Il est décédé après 1 mars 1214, à Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen 1120 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND 46 und seine Mutter Liukard Von Regensburg 31. Er hatte mit Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1. März 1214 in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen è nato il nel 1120, il suo padre, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Liukard Von Regensburg, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Morì dopo il 1 marzo 1214, nel Germania.

ja.Harburg (Schwaben), Donau-Ries, Bavaria,: ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ドナウ-リーズハーブルグ
ja.Frontenhausen, Germany: ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ディンゴルフィング-ランダウフロンテンハウセン
ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausenが1120年に生まれた時，父Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜNDは46歳，母Liukard Von Regensburgは31歳であった。彼はAdelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1214年3月1日以後にドイツで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen(이)가 1120년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Liukard Von Regensburg(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 3월 1일 이후 독일에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen nasceu em 1120, seu pai, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Liukard Von Regensburg, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Ele faleceu após 1 de março de 1214, em Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen родился в 1120 г., его отцу по имени Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Liukard Von Regensburg, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Он умер после 1 марта 1214 г. в местности Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen nació en 1120, su papá, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Liukard Von Regensburg, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Murió después de 1 de marzo de 1214, en Alemania.
